response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade GenAI systems, cloud-based RAG architectures, or vector databases — key requirements for this staff-level role. His work is broad but not deep in GenAI, and his resume mislabels his name as 'Szabo Bogdan' while using 'Wei Chen' as the header, raising red flags about authenticity.
strengths: Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK) and distributed systems
Strong track record of technical leadership, mentoring, and open-source contributions
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to production-grade GenAI or RAG systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or LLM evaluation pipelines
Name inconsistency (Wei Chen vs. Szabo Bogdan) undermines credibility and attention to detail
